title: 1 Growth Stock Down 15% to Buy Right Now
text: Despite cord-cutting, traditional pay-TV remains popular. Fox says a majority of its affiliate fees are up for renegotiation.

title: Shareholders ask Fox Corp to study labels for news vs opinion
text: Investors including well-known activist John Chevedden filed a shareholder resolution calling on Fox Corp to study using on-air branding to distinguish its news and opinion programming.

title: 3 Tucker Carlson Stocks to Buy for a War on Fox
text: Currently, there are a few Tucker Carlson stocks that have great potential due to the news personality's departure from Fox News in April 2023. Tucker Carlson parted ways with the network shortly after his commentary regarding former President Donald Trump came to light during Fox's trial with Dominion.

title: Tucker Carlson says he's coming back with ‘new version' of his show on Twitter
text: NEW YORK — Fired Fox news host Tucker Carlson said Tuesday that he will be putting out a “new version” of his program on Twitter.

title: Fox tops profit predictions as revenue jumps nearly 20% in Q3
text: Fox Corp. bested estimates for third-quarter revenue and adjusted profit due to a huge boost from the Super Bowl and advertising-supported streaming service Tubi.

title: Fox posts quarterly loss on Dominion settlement despite boost from Super Bowl, Tubi
text: Fox reported a $50 million net loss for the quarter due to costs related to its settlement with Dominion Voting.

title: Fox Will Report First Earnings Since Dominion Settlement And Carlson Exit—Revealing Whether It's In ‘Rebuilding Mode'
text: Fox Corp. will share its first quarterly earnings report of the year Tuesday after a noisy start to 2023, which included a nearly $800 million settlement for its news wing's touting of misinformation about the 2020 election.

title: Fox Will Report First Earnings Since Dominion Settlement And Carlson Exit—Revealing Whether It's In ‘Rebuilding Mode'
text: A possible boon for Fox as it navigates through unfavorable headlines: It should be less affected by the Hollywood writers strike than its peers, according to Wall Street.

title: Bishop Fox lays off employees days after throwing conference party
text: Cybersecurity firm Bishop Fox laid off around 50 employees — or 13% of its workforce — on Tuesday, the company told TechCrunch. The layoffs come just a few days after the company threw a party at the cybersecurity conference RSA, where the company apparently served branded drinks that it called “cyber soup.

title: Tucker Carlson's firing was sparked by this inflammatory text: report
text: That was former Fox News anchor Tucker Carlson in an apparent text sent to a producer hours after the deadly attacks on the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021 by supporters of former President Donald Trump, the New York Times reported Tuesday.

title: Fox's Short-Term Issues Reveal Value Opportunity
text: Fox Corp. ( FOX , Financial) has not been having the best time lately with all of its public relations disasters. The stock's performance in recent times has been unsatisfactory due to persistent legal risks and ongoing legal battles.
